---
title: "Bayesian Statistics — Overview"
author: "Johnny van Doorn"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
---

The slides are on 1 continuous page. To get a pdf, I recommend you use the print option in your browser to print the html to pdf (open the slides and press `ctrl + p` (Windows) or `cmd + p` (MacOS)).

**Textbook:** Johnson, A. A., Ott, M. Q., & Dogucu, M. (2022). *Bayes Rules! An Introduction to Applied Bayesian Modeling*. Chapman & Hall / CRC. Free online: <https://www.bayesrulesbook.com>.

## Slides — 2026

| Date | Lecture | Topics | Slides |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 Jun  | **Lecture 1** — Introduction & Bayes' Rule *(Alexandra Sarafoglou)* | Bayesian vs frequentist; probability; Bayes' rule (Ch. 1–2) | [pdf](https://johnnydoorn.github.io/teaching-statistics/bayesian-statistics-pml/2026/Canvas_Lecture_1_Introduction_and_Bayes_Rule.pdf) |
| 3 Jun  | **Lecture 2** — The Beta-Binomial Model & Sequential Testing *(Alexandra Sarafoglou)* | Beta prior; Binomial likelihood; conjugacy; sequential updating (Ch. 3–4) | [pdf](https://johnnydoorn.github.io/teaching-statistics/bayesian-statistics-pml/2026/Canvas_Lecture_2_The_Beta_Binomial_Model-1.pdf) |
| 8 Jun  | **Lecture 3** — Conjugate Models & Choosing Your Prior | Conjugacy; prior selection (Ch. 5) | [link](https://johnnydoorn.github.io/teaching-statistics/bayesian-statistics-pml/2026/Lecture3_Conjugacy/lecture3_conjugacy.html) |
| 10 Jun | **Lecture 4** — Obtaining the Posterior: Grid Approximation & MCMC | Grid + MCMC (Ch. 6 & 7) | [link](https://johnnydoorn.github.io/teaching-statistics/bayesian-statistics-pml/2026/Lecture4_GridMCMC/lecture4_gridmcmc.html) |
| 15 Jun | **Lecture 5** — Using the Posterior: Inference, Prediction & Hypothesis Testing | Estimation; prediction; Bayes factors (Ch. 8) | [link](https://johnnydoorn.github.io/teaching-statistics/bayesian-statistics-pml/2026/Lecture5_PosteriorInference/lecture5_posteriorinference.html) |
| 17 Jun | **Lecture 6** — Reporting Guidelines & Exam Preparation | Reporting; two mock exams; study checklist | [link](https://johnnydoorn.github.io/teaching-statistics/bayesian-statistics-pml/2026/Lecture6_ExamPrep/lecture6_examprep.html) |

## Contact

For questions, errata or suggestions, email Johnny van Doorn at [j.b.vandoorn@uva.nl](mailto:j.b.vandoorn@uva.nl).
